name: Almond Cookies, Red Dot
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and baking soda together.
2. Beat the egg and add the almond extract to the egg.
3. Cream the sugar with the shortening; add the egg; mix thoroughly.
4. Add the dry ingredients gradually, mixing until well combined.
5. Roll the dough into balls about 1-inch in diameter.
6. Place the balls about 1-inch apart on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Gently press your thumb into the center of each ball.
8. Touch the depression with red coloring.
9. Bake for 12 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
